description: Structural contract for audit-report.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas).

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: artifacts_reviewed
required_sections.fail_message: ## Artifacts Reviewed missing — Auditor must list what was reviewed

required_sections.name: verdict
required_sections.fail_message: ## Verdict missing — Auditor must declare a verdict
